title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 87.295 - Contributions by member, how computed
text:
87.295.  Contributions by member, how computed. — The board of trustees shall certify to the chief of the fire department and the chief of the fire department shall cause to be deducted from the salary of each member on each and every payroll for each and every pay period, eight percent of the compensation of each member not participating in the DROP program and one percent of the compensation of each member participating in the DROP program.
(L. 1943 p. 708 § 8, A.L. 1959 S.B. 314 § 86.570, A.L. 1977 H.B. 308, A.L. 1993 H.B. 259)
